# OutreachLog

## Description
Simple cold outreach tracker for solopreneurs. Track emails, LinkedIn DMs, Twitter outreach. See response rates and what converts.

## Product Information
- Category: Cold Outreach Tracker, Sales Tracking Tool
- Target Users: Solopreneurs, Freelancers, Consultants, Early-stage Founders
- Pricing: Free (25 contacts), Pro $19 one-time or $5/month
- Features: Contact tracking, Message templates, Analytics dashboard, CSV import/export

## Key URLs
- Landing Page: https://flowing-coral-w97v.here.now/landing.html
- App: https://flowing-coral-w97v.here.now/
- GitHub: https://github.com/mjcole76/outreachlog

## Use Cases
- Track cold email campaigns
- Monitor LinkedIn outreach response rates
- Compare template performance
- Measure ROI on cold outreach efforts
- Find which messages convert best

## Alternatives
Better than: Spreadsheets (manual), HubSpot/Pipedrive (expensive CRMs $50-500/month), Mailshake/Lemlist (email-only automation)

## Keywords
cold email tracker, outreach tracking, cold outreach CRM, sales tracking tool, response rate tracker, LinkedIn outreach tracker, solopreneur tools
